seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a new patient being seen for acid reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a past medical history of anxiety
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a past medical history of seasonal allergies
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports really bad acid reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient currently takes omeprazole 40 mg twice daily
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Some days the patient's acid reflux symptoms are controlled on omeprazole
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On some days the patient's acid reflux symptoms are really bad despite omeprazole
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient describes the reflux sensation as burning
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels burning in the chest
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels burning in the throat
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies difficulty swallowing
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies sensation of food or liquids getting stuck
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies abdominal pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies nausea
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies vomiting
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies changes in bowel movements
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies diarrhea
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies rectal bleeding
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had acid reflux since around age 12
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's acid reflux has worsened over the past few years
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been taking omeprazole in the current regimen for about a year
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels omeprazole has helped her symptoms to some extent
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that eating certain foods can make her reflux feel terrible
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient identifies stress as a trigger that worsens her reflux symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient identifies food choices as a trigger that worsens her reflux symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Spicy foods worsen the patient's reflux symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient tries not to eat spicy foods too often
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Drinking soda can cause the patient's reflux symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Tomato-based products sometimes worsen the patient's symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Citrus products sometimes worsen the patient's symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient continues to eat tomato-based and citrus products despite them sometimes worsening symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician finds it reassuring that the patient has no difficulty swallowing
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's weight has been pretty stable
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has had decreased appetite for the past two months
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports being under a lot of work stress
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient works as a paralegal
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's grandmother had esophageal cancer
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The grandmother with esophageal cancer is on the patient's maternal side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's mother has had issues like acid reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's mother took a medication that coats the lining of the stomach for reflux-like issues
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient may have had an upper endoscopy when she was younger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not had an upper endoscopy in the last 10 years
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient previously took omeprazole and ranitidine together
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The combination of omeprazole and ranitidine helped the patient's symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Other than omeprazole and ranitidine, the patient has not taken other reflux medications
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Physical exam is normal except for well-healed abdominal surgical scars
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has well-healed abdominal surgical scars
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had abdominal surgery as a baby for twisted intestines
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's intestinal surgery occurred around one month of age
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses that the patient has a several-year history of GERD
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes that the patient's GERD symptoms are poorly controlled on omeprazole 40 mg twice daily
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has heartburn despite taking omeprazole
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes that the patient has identified trigger foods including spicy foods, carbonated beverages, citrus, and tomato-based foods
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician notes the patient has not completely eliminated trigger foods from her diet
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician recommends dietary changes to avoid trigger foods that exacerbate GERD
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient agrees she could do a better job avoiding trigger foods
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician identifies stress as another trigger that worsens the patient's GERD symptoms
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports that stress and anxiety are big problems for her
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician recommends working on stress to help with GERD
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician proposes switching the patient from omeprazole to Nexium (esomeprazole)
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient agrees to try Nexium instead of omeprazole
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will send a prescription for Nexium 40 mg twice daily to the patient's pharmacy
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician recommends an EGD (upper endoscopy) to evaluate causes of GERD
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician explains that EGD involves sedation and passing a small camera from mouth to small intestine
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
